name: ThinkDashboard
description: A lightweight, bookmark dashboard with keyboard shortcuts
compose:
name: slashnode-thinkdashboard
services:
  server:
    image: ghcr.io/matiasdesuu/thinkdashboard:v0.7.6
    container_name: thinkdashboard
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      PORT: '8080'
    volumes:
      - server_data:/app/data
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:8229:8080
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  server_data:
    name: slashnode-thinkdashboard_server_data
